title: Israeli public turns on Trump as poll shows 71 percent no longer trust US; Israel Hayom calls MoU a 'surrender agreement'
significance_reason: Israeli public opinion turns sharply against Trump on MoU; backlash in pro-Trump paper signals structural rift in US-Israel alliance

title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz as Israel breaks Lebanon ceasefire one day after deal
significance_reason: Iran closes global oil chokepoint in direct response to Israeli Lebanon ceasefire violation; MoU in immediate jeopardy

title: MSF calls Nabatieh a 'death trap' as Israeli shelling kills 50 the day after Lebanon ceasefire announcement
significance_reason: MSF 'death trap' conditions in Nabatieh document humanitarian catastrophe of Israel's post-ceasefire offensive; Swiss talks disrupted

title: Netanyahu reaffirms Israel will not withdraw from Lebanon despite US-Iran MoU
significance_reason: Netanyahu's public rejection of Lebanon withdrawal directly challenges MoU; Iran's 'harsh response' warning precedes Hormuz reclosure two days later

title: Israeli drone strike kills three in Gaza; Health Ministry says 1,007 Palestinians killed since ceasefire deal
significance_reason: Post-ceasefire killing milestone (1,007 Palestinians killed after deal) coincides with Netanyahu's territorial expansion directive; systematic violation documented

title: Vance tells Israeli officials Trump is their only remaining ally; warns they can't 'kill your way out' of security problems
significance_reason: VP Vance delivers sharpest US rebuke of Israel in recent memory while refusing to threaten aid cutoff; gap between US rhetoric and leverage laid bare

title: CENTCOM lifts US naval blockade on Iran per MoU as oil prices fall
significance_reason: US naval blockade on Iran ends; MoU implementation begins; historic de-escalation, Israel strategically sidelined

title: Satellite imagery shows erasure of southern Gaza as Netanyahu orders expansion to 70 percent territorial control
significance_reason: Netanyahu orders IDF expansion from 60% to 70% of Gaza; satellite imagery documents near-total destruction of civilian infrastructure with famine imminent

title: ICC prosecutor requests arrest warrant for Finance Minister Smotrich, who vows Khan al-Ahmar evacuation
significance_reason: ICC escalates to sitting cabinet ministers after Netanyahu/Gallant warrants; Smotrich retaliates with Khan al-Ahmar evacuation order

title: Israeli strikes kill 41 in Lebanon in 24 hours as cumulative toll exceeds 2,600
significance_reason: 41 killed in single day; 2,659 cumulative dead since March 2, active war
